Artifact Stat

StatPercent all damage

Approx. type odds0.57%among eligible artifact types

How To Use It

Percent all damage is the readable effect family. The value range applies the same display multipliers used by the game artifact tooltip, so it is easier to compare with in-game rolls.

Recycles Into

MaterialQty
Metal Scrap5-15
Big Metal Scrap0-5
Hydrogen Spill1-7
